Professional X Banner Stand Material & Hardware Options

The Adjustable X Banner Stand provides professional trade show and business display solutions with telescoping arms that accommodate banners 20" to 35" wide and 45" to 72" high. This portable display system includes both the adjustable hardware stand and a custom 72" x 35" printed banner.

The telescoping arms collapse for compact storage and easy transport between trade shows, business presentations, and retail locations. The banner is printed at maximum 72" x 35" size for optimal visibility and professional presentation.

Your order includes the complete Adjustable X Banner Stand hardware system plus one custom printed banner. The stand sets up quickly without tools and provides stable display for indoor trade shows, outdoor business events, and retail environments.

Available with multiple material options including weather-resistant vinyl for outdoor use and soft fabric materials for indoor professional displays.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

X Banner Stand Material for Indoor & Outdoor Display

13 oz Vinyl for X Displays: Standard banner material rated for both indoor and outdoor use. Provides durability for trade shows, business displays, and outdoor promotional events.

14 oz No Curl Vinyl for Banner Stands: Premium no-curl vinyl specifically designed for banner stand applications. Resists curling and maintains flat display presentation for professional appearance.

14 oz No Curl Vinyl for X Displays: Heavy-duty no-curl material optimized for X banner stand hardware. Ideal for frequent setup and breakdown at trade shows and business events.

Banner Soft Fabric for X Displays: Matte finish fabric material with vibrant color reproduction. Perfect for indoor professional displays, trade show booths, and retail environments.

Request a sample packet of materials to compare material options for your X banner stand application.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for X Banner Stand Installation

All X banner stands include grommets positioned for optimal display with the adjustable telescoping hardware. The banner is finished with reinforced attachment points that connect securely to the stand arms.

The telescoping arms feature adjustable tension settings to accommodate different banner materials and ensure proper display tension. Hardware includes rubber feet for stable floor placement during trade shows and business presentations.

Banner finishing includes hemmed edges for durability and professional appearance. The lightweight hardware design allows for easy transport while maintaining stability during display use.

Setup requires no additional tools or hardware. The complete system stores compactly for transport between trade show events and business locations.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom X Banner Stand Production & Turnaround Times

Production Time Options

2 Business Days Express: Fast turnaround for urgent trade show deadlines and last-minute business display needs.

3 Business Days Standard: Standard production time for most X banner stand orders with custom printing.

5 Business Days Saver: Economy production option for advance planning and cost-effective X banner stand orders.

Production times begin after artwork approval and order confirmation. Rush production available for trade show deadlines and urgent business display requirements.

All production times include custom banner printing and hardware packaging for immediate use upon delivery.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

X Banner Stand Payment & Ordering Options

Multiple payment methods accepted for X banner stand orders including major credit cards, business accounts, and purchase orders for qualifying organizations.

Secure online ordering available 24/7 with immediate order confirmation and production scheduling. Business accounts available for frequent trade show exhibitors and organizations with multiple display needs.

Purchase orders accepted from schools, government agencies, and established business customers. Net payment terms available for qualifying accounts.

All orders include detailed invoice with itemized pricing for X banner stand hardware and custom banner printing services.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom X Banner Stand Delivery

General Shipping Guidelines

X banner stands ship via ground service in protective packaging to prevent hardware damage during transport. Banner and hardware components are packaged together for convenient delivery.

Expedited shipping available for urgent trade show deadlines and last-minute business display needs. Tracking information provided for all shipments.

Shipping Methods

Standard ground shipping includes insurance coverage for X banner stand hardware and custom printed banner. Overnight and 2-day shipping options available for rush orders.

Large quantity orders may ship via freight service depending on total order weight and dimensions. White glove delivery available for trade show venues and business locations.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show & Business Display Uses for X Banner Stands

Trade Show Displays: Portable banner stands ideal for trade show booths, exhibition halls, and convention center displays. Easy setup and breakdown between show days.

Business Presentations: Professional display solution for corporate presentations, sales meetings, and business conferences. Adjustable sizing accommodates various venue requirements.

Retail Promotions: In-store promotional displays for retail locations, shopping centers, and promotional events. Weather-resistant materials suitable for outdoor retail applications.

Educational Events: School events, career fairs, and educational presentations. Lightweight hardware allows easy transport between multiple venues.

Real Estate Displays: Open house events, real estate presentations, and property marketing displays. Professional appearance suitable for client-facing applications.

Restaurant & Hospitality: Menu displays, special event promotion, and restaurant marketing. Indoor and outdoor material options for various hospitality applications.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

X Banner Stand Artwork Requirements for Printing

Artwork Guidelines

Vector-based file types print with optimal quality, including .eps files with fonts converted to outlines. High resolution .pdf and .jpg files also accepted for X banner stand printing.

Professional graphic design services available if artwork assistance is needed. Our designers can optimize files for X banner stand display and ensure proper resolution for the 72" x 35" print size.

Artwork & Order Proofs

Order proofs available to verify artwork, pricing, and shipping information before production begins. Proof includes low-resolution artwork preview and complete order summary.

Production will not begin until proof approval is received. This ensures accuracy for custom X banner stand orders and prevents production delays.

Color Match Proof System

Color-critical projects can request color match proofs to ensure accurate color reproduction for brand-specific X banner stand displays. Additional time and fees apply for color matching services.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom X Banner Stands for Professional Display

Ready to create your professional X banner stand display? Our complete system includes adjustable hardware and custom printed banner for immediate use at trade shows, business presentations, and promotional events.

Choose from multiple material options including weather-resistant vinyl for outdoor use and premium fabric for indoor professional displays. Our telescoping hardware accommodates various banner sizes while providing stable, professional presentation.

Upload your artwork or select from our template library to get started. Professional design services available for custom X banner stand creation. Fast production times available for urgent trade show deadlines.

Questions about material selection, sizing, or artwork requirements? Our banner experts are available Monday-Friday 8AM-4PM CST at 866.419.7446 or through our online customer service system.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

X Banner Stand Installation & Setup

How do I set up the Adjustable X Banner Stand?

The X banner stand sets up without tools by extending the telescoping arms and attaching the banner to the provided connection points. Adjust arm length to achieve proper banner tension and display size.

What banner sizes work with the Adjustable X Banner Stand?

The stand accommodates banners from 20" to 35" wide and 45" to 72" high. Standard production size is 72" x 35" for maximum display visibility.

Can I use the X banner stand outdoors?

Yes, when ordered with weather-resistant vinyl material. The 13 oz vinyl and 14 oz no-curl vinyl options are rated for outdoor use. Indoor fabric materials should be used for indoor applications only.

How compact is the stand for transport?

The telescoping arms collapse for compact storage and transport. The complete system fits easily in most vehicles for transport between trade show venues and business locations.

Can I order replacement banners for my existing stand?

Yes, replacement banners are available for existing X banner stand hardware. Contact customer service with your stand specifications to ensure proper sizing and compatibility.

What file formats do you accept for custom printing?

We accept .eps, .pdf, .jpg, and other high-resolution file formats. Vector files with outlined fonts provide the best print quality for large format X banner stand displays.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
